channel.title: Legislation on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in Legislation on Nature Works

item.title: Future Generations
item.description:
The Wellbeing of Future Generations Act 2015 for Wales

Wellbeing of Future Generations Act 7 goals Globally responsible Wales Prosperous Wales Resilient Wales Healthier Wales More equal Wales Wales of cohesive communities Wales of vibrant culture and thriving Welsh language 5 ways of working The long term - Avoiding short-termism and considering how decisions will impact on the well-being of future as well as current generations. http://localhost:1313/future-generations/
